content: Reviewed SPEC-20260219-174121 for architectural alignment. Confidence: 0.91. Verdict: Needs Changes (2 blocking). BLOCKING: (1) AgentRepository statelessness and Phase 3 extension point undocumented — must explicitly state that AgentRepository is stateless with SessionNotifier owning conversation state, and add constructor comment for future ClaudeApiService injection. (2) Domain model ambiguity — lib/models/journal_session.dart and journal_message.dart listed in Affected Components but no creation instructions anywhere in the spec; must clarify that Phase 1 uses drift generated data classes directly. ADVISORY: (F2) Document constructor-injection DAO pattern rationale inline. (F3) Add dart analyze lib/database/ verification step after Task 5. (F5) Document lastSessionDate flow: provider reads DAO, passes to repository method parameter. (F6) Add CLAUDE.md update to Task 12/13 checklist. (F7) String-based named routes are fine for Phase 1 but note go_router upgrade path before Phase 5. (F8) NativeDatabase.memory() test environment note. (F9) Remove unused build_verify dependency. ARCHITECTURAL DEBT NOTED: JournalRepository (CRUD orchestrator) absent in Phase 1 — providers call DAOs directly. Phase 4 will need to introduce this layer for sync orchestration.

Reviewed SPEC-20260219-174121 for test strategy completeness. Confidence: 0.87. Verdict: Needs Changes (3 blocking). BLOCKING: (F1) SessionNotifier is the central business object but has zero test coverage — must add test/providers/session_notifier_test.dart. (F2) timestamp_utils.dart has 4 pure functions with multiple branches but no tests — must add test/utils/timestamp_utils_test.dart. (F3) getGreeting boundary cases missing: null lastSessionDate, exactly 1 day ago (no gap), exactly 2 days ago (gap triggers). Coverage estimate: 6 test files insufficient for 80% target; expanded to 10 files. ADDITIONAL HIGH: (F3) endSession DAO test must assert each of 5 written fields individually. (F4) getGreeting time-of-day tests are non-deterministic without DateTime? now parameter. MEDIUM: (F5) Add sync_status_test.dart for fromString/toDbString round-trip. (F6) Cross-session message isolation test needed. (F7) Session list needs populated-state test. (F8) end_session_button needs dialog confirmation tests. (F9) getFollowUp non-repetition must be verified over multiple calls. LOW: (F10) generateLocalSummary edge cases: empty list, single word, no punctuation. (F11) database.close() in tearDown required for all DAO tests. (F12) Add DateTime? now parameter to getGreeting for deterministic testing.

Reviewed SPEC-20260219-174121 for security implications. Confidence: 0.88. Verdict: Approve with changes (2 blocking). BLOCKING: (F1) android:allowBackup=true is Flutter default — journal SQLite file extractable via adb backup or Google Cloud Backup. Must set android:allowBackup=false in AndroidManifest.xml as part of Task 1 post-scaffold setup. (F3) .gitignore has *.db and *.sqlite3 but NOT *.sqlite — database file is named agentic_journal.sqlite and would not be gitignored. Must add *.sqlite pattern. ADVISORY: (F2) drift schema stores role and inputMethod as unconstrained TextColumn — no SQL injection risk (drift parameterizes), but no application-level enum validation. Harmless in Phase 1 but should be enforced before Phase 3 sync ingestion. (F4) All dependencies use caret versioning which is standard Dart convention — no action needed for Phase 1. (F5) Quality gate has no manifest security check — recommend adding android:allowBackup=false assertion pre-Phase 4. STRENGTHS: drift type-safe queries eliminate SQL injection by construction; client-generated UUIDs are not enumerable; UTC-everywhere timestamps prevent timezone corruption; existing hook validator scans 12 secret patterns; no API keys in Phase 1.

Synthesized all three specialist reviews into spec updates. All 5 blocking findings addressed: (1) AgentRepository documented as intentionally stateless with Phase 3 extension point comment — Task 7 updated. (2) Domain model ambiguity resolved: Phase 1 uses drift generated classes directly, separate domain models deferred to Phase 3 — Task 6 updated. (3) *.sqlite added to .gitignore — Task 1 updated. (4) android:allowBackup=false added as post-scaffold security hardening step — Task 1 updated. (5) Test suite expanded from 6 to 10 files: added session_notifier_test, timestamp_utils_test, sync_status_test, end_session_button_test; expanded boundary cases for getGreeting, endSession assertions, cross-session isolation — Task 11 rewritten. Additional incorporated: DateTime? now param on getGreeting (Task 7), DAO pattern rationale (Task 5), dart analyze verification step (Task 5), lastSessionDate flow documentation (Task 8), navigation strategy note (Task 9), CLAUDE.md update requirement (Task 12/13), build_verify removed from pubspec (Task 2). Spec status changed from draft to reviewed. Linked spec: docs/sprints/SPEC-20260219-174121-phase1-walking-skeleton.md
